decision: do_not_freeze_delivery_yet; open a structured metric-rescue sprint with explicit risk and stop gates
rationale: P135-P138 made the paper safe, but only used quick existing-artifact sweeps. Several metrics may still improve with targeted postprocessing, richer selectors, and evaluation-scope cleanup before final submission.

global_policy.primary_goal: Improve paper-facing metrics where plausible without inventing claims or changing target definitions silently.
global_policy.secondary_goal: If a metric cannot be improved, convert it into a stronger negative/ablation story with clearer error buckets.
global_policy.stop_rule: Stop a rescue branch if it cannot improve the relevant headline by at least a meaningful delta within its time budget or if it requires unbounded training before the deadline.
global_policy.claim_rule: Every improved metric must state dataset split, evidence mode, evaluation threshold, and whether it is model-output, postprocess, expected-json replay, or oracle-assisted.

priority_lanes.lane: Lane A: Public-raster symbol operating point rescue
priority_lanes.why: Symbol is central to the MoE story. P136 showed no center>=0.90 from naive v28 threshold/top-k, but best balanced F1 improved to 0.367019; there may be gains via label-specific thresholds, NMS/box merging, tiny-symbol handling, and P124 selector features.
current_metrics: P100 F1 0.295190, precision 0.188403, recall 0.681419, center 0.824163, inflation 3.616826
P136 best balanced F1 0.367019, precision 0.254678, recall 0.656699, center 0.766348, inflation 2.578549
target_metrics: Stretch: F1 >= 0.45 or center >= 0.85 with inflation <= 4.0
Do not target: F1 >= 0.95, unrealistic for current detector
tasks: Run label-specific score threshold sweeps instead of one global threshold.
Add NMS/duplicate suppression sweep by same-label and any-label IoU.
Analyze per-label failures; rescue easy labels separately rather than one global policy.
Use P124 selector probabilities as a re-ranker if prediction IDs/features can be joined.
Create error buckets: missed tiny, duplicated large, wrong label, over-dense equipment/shower/sink.

priority_lanes.lane: Lane B: Room/space box extraction rescue
priority_lanes.why: P137 shows room pixel recall >0.95 but low precision/F1; the gap is likely postprocessing, not pure model failure. Better connected components, morphology, contour simplification, area filtering, and room merging may lift box-level F1.
current_metrics: Pixel room best F1 0.606234, recall 0.959362, precision 0.443126
target_metrics: Pixel-level: keep recall >= 0.95 while improving precision if possible
tasks: Locate existing mask-to-box extraction script/settings from P106.
Sweep connected component min area, closing/opening kernel, contour simplification, and merge thresholds.
Optimize box-level room/space F1 and center recall, not just pixel recall.
Add qualitative failure gallery for room over-segmentation vs under-segmentation.

priority_lanes.lane: Lane C: Relation result strengthening without overclaiming
priority_lanes.why: P095 candidate is already 1.0 but bounded to expected-json replay. The rescue is not metric improvement; it is credibility improvement by replaying on noisier model-output subsets if available.
current_metrics: Expected-json candidate F1 1.0 on primary and secondary smoke
target_metrics: Maintain relation F1 >0.95 on one model-output smoke path if available
If unavailable, produce explicit limitation and future eval protocol
tasks: Search for model-output scene graph predictions with room/symbol boxes and relation candidates.
Run contains policy on a small model-output smoke subset if schemas match.
If not possible, write a reproducibility protocol for model-output relation validation.

priority_lanes.why: P124 AUC 0.854388/AP 0.637250 shows signal; failure is inflation. A listwise budget/constraint layer may pass gates without retraining.
target_metrics: Stretch: inflation <= 5 with small center drop
tasks: Sweep page-level budgets, label budgets, spatial suppression on P124 dev predictions.
Use objective that penalizes inflation more strongly.
Report as selector rescue only if all gates pass; otherwise keep negative.

priority_lanes.lane: Lane E: Text/symbol image-only branch triage
priority_lanes.why: Current metrics are too low for quick rescue, but error analysis can improve paper quality. Only attempt if there is a clear OCR or threshold script already available.
tasks: Search for OCR outputs or text candidate artifacts.
If available, evaluate text recall-only smoke; otherwise keep negative.
Create failure taxonomy and future-work plan.

execution_order: P142 relation model-output smoke if artifacts exist
P145 update manuscript tables/claims after rescue sprint
paper_update_policy: Do not update manuscript headline claims until a rescue artifact is complete and validated. Keep v0.3 as safe baseline; create v0.4 only after P140/P141/P143 decisions.

risk_register.mitigation: Each lane has stop gates and must produce either improved metric or stronger negative evidence.
Every artifact records source files, split, evidence mode, and target definitions.
Balanced metrics and caveats remain mandatory; recall-only >0.95 is not solved extraction.
